name: Flower Brain v3: SmearGate + TTT + GPTQ — val_bpb 1.0877 (3-seed mean)
author: G3sparky (Gavin Saunders)
blurb: Flower Brain v3: novel 6-cell architecture with SmearGate (learned bigram gate), QK-Gain 5.25, depth recurrence (layers 3-5 x2), GPTQ int6/int8 + Brotli-11 compression, score-first TTT (3-epoch SGD). 8xH100 SXM, 3-seed mean 1.0877 BPB (std 0.0001). Under 16MB.
key_changes: SmearGate: learned per-dimension blending with previous token embedding
Score-first TTT: 3-epoch SGD per chunk, TTT_CHUNK_TOKENS=16384
GPTQ int6/int8 compression with LZMA bootstrap code
Depth recurrence: layers 3-5 loop x2 (activated at 35%)
Flower Brain 6-cell architecture — novel, answers organizer wish list

unlimited_compute.note: Same architecture, 2hr training on 1xH100 + LoRA-TTT eval

base: Flower Brain 6-Cell Architecture + SP8192 + Depth Recurrence + Parallel Residuals
